description: English Translation ROMs Collection (2024) Tags: [i] - Incomplete (Not fully translated) [n] - Name (If a game name or title screen is modified from original version into English ) DATs DOWNLOAD Disclaimer: DATs are not mine, if some translations are missing or outdated, you can report in the comments below to inform the viewers.
